mapper.sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.generic_name AS genericName, d.brand_name AS brandName, d.specification, d.dosage_form AS dosageForm, d.category, d.unit, d.manufacturer, d.approval_number AS approvalNumber, d.price, COALESCE(d.stock_quantity, 0) AS stockQuantity, COALESCE(d.low_stock_threshold, 10) AS lowStockThreshold, COALESCE(d.status, 1) AS status, d.create_time AS createTime, d.update_time AS updateTime FROM drug_info d
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM drug_info WHERE COALESCE(status, 1) = 1 AND category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' ORDER BY category
